name: job-portal-mern
description: Naukri-like job portal using MERN + Tailwind

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run backend:dev" "node scripts/wait-for-api.cjs && npm run frontend:dev"
scripts.dev:open: concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run backend:dev" "node scripts/wait-for-api.cjs && npm run frontend:dev -- --open"
